hero.desc: I'm Unai. Full Stack Developer based in Bilbao — I build products that actually work, from the database schema in Spring Boot down to the last pixel in React.

about.title: About me
about.note: Bilbao → production, via Spring Boot and React.
about.quote: I build software with the same mindset I used to plan trajectories for an autonomous race car: if it doesn't really work, on track or in production, it doesn't count.
about.bio1: Full Stack Developer with 1.5 years of experience, graduated in Computer Engineering from UPV/EHU. I'm passionate about building complete products that actually work, not just pretty demos.
about.bio2: I was part of Formula Student Bizkaia, on the autonomous driving team: path planning for the car with ROS2 and Python, competing at FSUK Silverstone 2024.
